event: Abbey of Saint Etienne, Caen, France
description: A photograph of the rear elevation of a large Romanesque-Gothic abbey church showing multiple pointed spires rising above the roofline, a prominent apse with arched windows and a rose window, flying buttresses supporting the upper walls, and adjacent buildings. The warm limestone facade is lit by sunlight against a clear blue sky. The architecture combines Romanesque rounded arches at the lower levels with Gothic pointed spires and lancet windows above, showing the evolution of medieval church building. The composition emphasizes the vertical aspiration and monumental scale of the structure.

_meta.title: Abbey of Saint Etienne, Caen, France
